title: Sequential Search Algorithm Flowchart
description: A flowchart depicting the step-by-step process of searching for a target element in an unsorted list using sequential search.
relationships: Initialize Index leads to Index < List Size?
Index < List Size? leads to Element Found? (if yes) or End (Failure) (if no)
Element Found? leads to End (Success) (if yes) or Increment Index & loop back to Index < List Size? (if no)
